resources.string: Phone settings to enable (do these once)

Set these in your phone's Settings, not here — they keep the app alive in the background on MagicOS:

1. Notification Access — use the button above (required).
2. Battery optimization — use the button above; set NotifBypass to “Do not optimize”.
3. Lock in Recents — open Recents, long-press the NotifBypass card, tap the lock icon.
4. App launch — Settings → Apps → NotifBypass → Launch: turn off “Manage automatically”, then enable Auto-launch, Secondary launch, and Run in background.
5. Startup apps — Phone Manager → Startup apps: allow NotifBypass.
Comma-separated names/handles per app. Leave an app blank to disable it.
Repeats in Silent/DND (how many times her text buzz plays)
Also match the message text (needed for group chats; off = sender name only)
Also play alarm sound on a match (loud, DND-proof)
